kept.text:
#Bristol #UK — Activists from “People Against Genocide” carried out a series of actions against weapons factories in the United Kingdom. 

The activists entered an Elbit Systems factory, aiming to destroy the company’s equipment and halt the production of armored vehicle protection systems and drones used by the Israeli army in attacks against Palestinians. 

Elbit Systems is Israel’s largest military company and is considered a key supplier to the Israel Defense Forces.

kept.text:
🇷🇴🇮🇱 The first flight of the Watchkeeper XR tactical drone by Israeli arms firm Elbit Systems took place in Romania.

Also in Romania, the first Elbit facility with a local full assembly line for drones was opened, marking a new milestone in the development of bilateral relations between Romania and Israel in the arms sector.
The Watchkeeper XR is a modern tactical unmanned aerial system designed for reconnaissance missions at medium altitudes.
